name: tooltip
description: An accessible tooltip shown on hover and on keyboard focus, wired to its trigger via aria-describedby so screen-reader users hear it too. Delayed on hover, instant on focus, hides on blur / leave / Escape.

notes: The tip is a role=tooltip referenced by the trigger's aria-describedby
Shows on focus as well as hover, so it is reachable by keyboard
Hides on blur, mouse-leave and Escape
The tip is pointer-events-none so it never blocks the trigger

intents: show a tooltip on hover and keyboard focus
an accessible hint attached to a button or icon
describe a control with an aria-describedby tooltip
